name: mcp-client
description: Consume external MCP servers (HTTP/SSE) as agent tools via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk — CRUD + probe + mcp__<server>__<tool> merger into gatewayTools.
notes: probeServer + execute() reconnect per call (no persistent process; ~100-400ms). Header/credential values are stripped from error text before reaching the model. LOOP GUARD: derived tools are surfaced to AGENTS ONLY (gatewayTools) — never re-exported on our own /mcp server. Workspace-shared servers + tool-level RBAC are later phases.
